message.text: Tpose and calibrate emotes are great for anyone that does vrc

I think lithium ion is the lightest rechargeable per capacity, there are lighter non-rechargeable and better capacity per volume
@TheOtherJoe Nuh uh, you forgot about Silicon Cadmium batteries?
The reason the Realme P4 Power smartphone has 10001 Mah Battery capacity at only 170 grams
@fenrico_macbeth Aren't Cadmium batteries are not allowed many places due to environmental concerns?
@TheOtherJoe It's in little traces. So it's not a biggie, Most Chinese brands like Oppo, Oneplus, Realme, Xiaomi, Redmi use these batteries in their phones
OH SHIT I FOKED UP ITS SILICON CARBON NOY CADMIUM SORRY MLADY
Nickel Cadmium batteries for you then
oh, Silicon‐carbon, honest not familiar with those tbh
